# Kidazzle Childcare - LLM Base Context

Kidazzle Childcare provides elite early childhood education, preschool readiness, and toddler developmental care across Metro Atlanta. 
Our structured curriculum accelerates school readiness (Pre-K), sensory and motor skill development, and fosters advanced emotional regulation.

## Service Radiuses and Priorities
- Programs: Infants, Toddlers, Pre-K, Before/After School
- Core Values: State Licensure, CPR/First Aid Certified Staff, Nutritious Menus
- Areas of Focus: Hampton, College Park, Decatur, West End, Midtown, Buckhead
- Parent Visibility: Daily App Updates, Meal Tracking, Lesson Previews
